name: Randolph County School System
districtFact: Randolph County School System publishes annual school calendar PDFs with first and last student days, teacher workdays, holidays, annual leave, early release dates, quarter dates, report card dates, and inclement-weather make-up notes.

about.title: About Randolph County School System
about.content: Randolph County School System serves students in Randolph County, North Carolina. The district calendar lists first and last school days, teacher workdays, required teacher workdays, holidays, annual leave, early releases, quarter endings, report cards, interim reports, and make-up day guidance.

about.title: Which RCSS Calendar Should You Use?
about.content: This page summarizes the districtwide Randolph County School System calendar PDFs. Families should also check their school calendar and announcements for open house times, early release details, and weather-related make-up changes.

planningTips.title: Planning Tips for Randolph County Families
content: Add 2-hour early dismissal dates separately because they change afternoon transportation and childcare.
Treat teacher workdays, required teacher workdays, annual leave, and holidays as student no-school dates for planning.
Review the inclement-weather make-up notes because the district absorbs the first five days before using listed make-up dates.
Check the official RCSS calendar page for revised PDFs and school-specific announcements.

compareIntro: Compare the Randolph County School System calendar with other North Carolina district calendars currently available on MySchoolDates. Dates shown include the first day, last day, and spring break.

districtFaqs.q: Which Randolph County calendar does this page summarize?
districtFaqs.a: This page summarizes the official Randolph County School System calendar PDFs for North Carolina.

districtFaqs.q: Are RCSS teacher workdays student holidays?
districtFaqs.a: For family planning, teacher workdays and required teacher workdays are student no-school days unless the district announces a make-up change.

districtFaqs.q: Does RCSS list inclement-weather make-up days?
districtFaqs.a: Yes. The calendar states that the district absorbs the first five inclement-weather days before using listed make-up dates, with some remote learning days possible in 2026-2027.

districtFaqs.q: Where should families verify RCSS calendar updates?
districtFaqs.a: Use the official Randolph County School System calendar page and school announcements for final confirmation. MySchoolDates is an independent reference and is not affiliated with RCSS.
